message:
Round 13: Unsafe bounds checks (minimal 0.5% gain)

Results: 755ms → 751ms (-4ms, -0.5%)
Gap to rs-bpe: 158ms (26.6% slower)

Changes:
- aho_corasick.zig: @setRuntimeSafety(false) in 2 functions
- backtrack_encoder.zig: @setRuntimeSafety(false) in 3 functions

Why minimal impact:
- Zig ReleaseFast already removes most bounds checks
- Real bottleneck is algorithmic, not safety overhead

Remaining gap: 158ms requires AC memory layout or FnvHash
